nodes.label: Transaction Void Delete Workflow
nodes.rationale: The journal template exposes modal workflows for voiding and deleting accounting transactions with CSRF-protected POST forms.

nodes.label: Financial Reporting Workflow
nodes.rationale: The reports templates coordinate report type selection, date ranges, HTML display, Excel export, and PDF rendering for accounting reports.

nodes.label: Side Drawer Workflow
nodes.rationale: Multiple templates use data-action open-drawer and data-drawer-form attributes that depend on the global drawer container and drawer.js loaded by the base layout.

nodes.label: Confirmation Modal
nodes.rationale: The base layout defines a reusable confirm modal used by delete controls that pass data-action confirm-delete attributes.

nodes.label: Notification Menu
nodes.rationale: The base layout provides top-bar notification badge, dropdown, popup modal, and URLs for recent, popup, and mark-all notification actions.

nodes.label: Selected Company Context
nodes.rationale: Navigation and many module links derive company scope from selected_company_slug or selected_company_id in the session.

nodes.label: Low Stock Threshold
nodes.rationale: Inventory list highlights stock as low when item.quantity is less than or equal to five.

nodes.label: Catalog Selection Workflow
nodes.rationale: The order form embeds suppliers and inventory items as JSON and uses client-side modals to select suppliers and add catalog products to purchase order rows.

nodes.label: Notification Delivery Workflow
nodes.rationale: The notification center combines inbox filtering, mark-read controls, optional admin send form, target selection, popup flag, and recent sent notifications.

nodes.label: Cross Module Search
nodes.rationale: Global search explicitly spans contacts, documents, inventory, orders, payments, projects, expenses, warehouses, and companies.

nodes.label: Warehouse Stock Context
nodes.rationale: Warehouse list shows each warehouse's active state and product count, tying storage locations to inventory quantities.
